narrative:
23Pleasant (precinct in Perry County) has 623 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
